properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v4 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are one in the Spirit We are one in the Lord We are one in the Spirit We are one in the Lord And I pray that our unity may one day be restored

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And they'll know we are Christians By our love, by our love Yes, they'll know we are Christians by our love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will walk with each other We will walk hand in hand We will walk with each other We will walk hand in hand And together we'll spread the news that God is in our land

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: They'll know us by our love Our love (love, love) Our love (love, love) Our love (love) :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We will work with each other We will work side by side We will work with each other We will work side by side And we will guard each other's dignity And save each other's pride

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And they'll know we are Christians By our love, by our love Yes, they'll know we are Christians By our love, by our love Yes, they'll know we are Christians By our love, by our love Yes, they'll know we are Christians By our love (love, love), Oh, Oh

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: They will know we are Christians By our love, by our love Yes, they'll know we are Christians by our love
